Academy Awards for scientific and technical achievement shall be given by the Board of Governors upon recommendation from the Scientific and Technical Awards Executive Committee and the Board Awards Committee. 5. No current employee of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences shall be – through direct application, application by proxy, discovery by committee, or by upgrade from a previous achievement – the recipient of the Technical Achievement Award, Scientific and Engineering Award, or the Academy Award of Merit for a Scientific and Technical achievement and shall remain ineligible for a period of three years after their employment has ended. 2. In related events, the Academy is set to hold its 17th Governors Awards ceremony at the Ray Dolby Ballroom of the Ovation Hollywood complex in Hollywood on November 15, 2026.
